title: National Student Loans Service Centre in MSCA - Canada.ca
content:
## National Student Loans Service Centre in MSCA
You can access your National Student Loans Service Centre (NSLSC) account from My Service Canada Account (MSCA). Your NSLSC account allows you to:
- confirm your enrolment
- apply for the Repayment Assistance Plan (RAP)
- access tax documents, and much more
To access your NSLSC account, you must first register or sign in to MSCA. This new process will provide a real-time identity verification and enhanced security measures to help protect your personal information.
For more information and to learn how to apply for student financial assistance, visit the National Student Loans Service Centre website.
Once registered or signed in, go to the "National Student Loans Service Centre" section on your dashboard.
Register or Sign in to MSCA

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
